title: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Step 1: Heat a skillet over medium heat.
Step 2: Butter one side of each bread slice.
Step 3: Place one slice butter-side down, add cheese slices, top with second slice butter-side up.
Step 4: Cook 3-4 minutes until golden brown, flip and cook another 3-4 minutes.
Step 5: Remove from heat, slice diagonally and serve hot.

substitutions.note: Use same amount for a slightly healthier option
